context: Tests whether the response correctly explains Rust ownership/borrowing errors with threads.

checklist.name: Identifies the closure capture issue
checklist.description: Explains that the closure borrows data, but the thread might outlive the main function, so Rust requires ownership transfer

checklist.name: Fix 1: move keyword
checklist.description: Shows using move || to transfer ownership into the thread (and removing the second println since data is moved)

checklist.name: Fix 2: Arc or clone
checklist.description: Shows using Arc<Vec> to share ownership across threads, or cloning the data before spawning

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about Rust ownership, lifetimes, or thread safety
